programs.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programs.desc: Katey and Dan plan a night of fun with Josh and Holly. Nicolle and Ben try a couple swap, but can Nicolle overcome her anxieties.

programs.title: Naked Attraction
programs.desc: Luke, who's lost his dating mojo, is raring to re-invigorate his love life and find a lady to relight his fire. And can pole dancer Abi find someone to send her heart into a spin.

programs.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programs.desc: Dave and Lynn get to work on their dream farmhouse kitchen-diner, while Pete goes shopping for a tractor for his family's new smallholding.

programs.title: Escape to Florida
programs.desc: The fun-filled lives of the Brits seeking a fresh start. In Orlando, it's opening night for the Best of British pub. In Kissimmee, Anthony's busy cooking at his own birthday party.
